description: Characters who aid, assist, and stand alongside the protagonists.
roles: Sidekick
Unquestioning loyalty following the protagonists into danger, making every risk feel more personal because someone faithful is on the line.
Henchman
Grunt work handled so the protagonists don't have to, freeing them to focus on the larger threat ahead.
Backup
Salvation arriving at the critical moment when defeat seems certain, rewarding the protagonists for building alliances early.
Specialist
A gap the protagonists cannot close on their own, creating dependence on an outside skill they do not control.
Cheerleader
Defiant optimism holding spirits together when the situation looks hopeless, reminding the protagonists why the fight still matters.
Network Node
Connections branching outward to allies and resources, expanding the protagonists' reach far beyond what they could achieve alone.
Safe Harbor
A place to rest between crises, giving the story breathing room and the protagonists a home worth defending.
Resource Provider
A lifeline supplying what the protagonists need to keep going -- whose disruption would leave them dangerously exposed.
Advisor
A second perspective offered before critical decisions, helping the protagonists see angles they would otherwise miss entirely.
Champion
A voice speaking on the protagonists' behalf where their own carries no weight, turning social barriers into open doors.
